asset_name: Somatropin Safety and Living Evidence Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_type: Safety, contraindication and current development evidence
evidence_grade: A1/B1 — current official source plus primary clinical evidence
controlled_conclusion: Current somatropin controls include acute critical illness mortality, active malignancy, glucose intolerance, intracranial hypertension, fluid retention, slipped capital femoral epiphysis, scoliosis progression, pancreatitis and specific Prader-Willi syndrome risks. Growth-hormone use remains subject to current anti-doping controls.

sources.title: GENOTROPIN current United States prescribing information
Four-year randomised daily versus three-times-weekly somatropin trial
Two-year placebo-controlled somatropin dose-response study in young adults

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised, sponsor or trial product to catalogue supplier material
Creation of personal dosing, injection or reconstitution guidance
Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
Representation of orphan designation or trial registration as marketing authorisation
next_review_trigger: Material approval, label, trial-result, safety, warning, recall, manufacturer, quality, anti-doping or supplier-evidence change
